name: @platform/contracts-ingestion
description: External data ingestion contract package for source payload schemas, normalization contracts, and ingestion event envelopes.

readme.summary: External data ingestion contract package for source payload schemas, normalization contracts, and ingestion event envelopes.
responsibilities: Own external source payload contracts and normalized ingestion event envelopes
Define compatibility expectations for external data ingestion
Separate ingestion contracts from runtime transport and analytical storage
nonResponsibilities: Does not call external source systems
Does not write to PostgreSQL or ClickHouse
Does not own product-specific interpretation of ingested data
usage: Consumed by ingestion adapters and tests
Used to validate external data before mapping to transactional or analytical packages
operationalNotes: External data ingestion is a first-class boundary because external source contracts are not controlled by the application
